role_summary: the finance officer oversees financial planning, budgeting, and financial control in a psu.
responsibilities: • prepare budgets, forecasts, and financial plans   • monitor expenditure and financial performance   • support  investment, procurement, and contract decisions   • ensure financial discipline and cost control   • prepare mis and management reports   • advise management on financial matters
qualifications: • qualified ca   • strong financial planning and analysis skills   • know ledge of psu finance and regulations
